title: taraxacum praeticum
intro: Taraxacum praeticum is a lesser-known variant of the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale), although it is still a member of the dandelion family and shares many similarities with it. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum praeticum include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating urinary issues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum praeticum include improving liver function, reducing blood pressure, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum praeticum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
